into_the_wild.name: Zoologischer Garten
into_the_wild.description: A major zoo and public garden in Berlin, mentioned as a destination by locals for exploration and observation.

into_the_wild.name: Mauerpark Fleamarket
into_the_wild.description: A popular outdoor market and park area where locals shop for items and spend leisure time, offering a casual Berlin experience.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Berlin Television Tower (Fernsehturm)
gram_worthy_spots.description: Iconic observation tower offering panoramic views of Berlin with a visitor center. Great for tilt-shift photography and cityscape shots inspired by miniature world aesthetics.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Alexanderplatz
gram_worthy_spots.description: Famous Berlin landmark known for atmospheric views, particularly during special celestial events like blood moons that make striking photography subjects.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Berlin skyline from various viewpoints
gram_worthy_spots.description: Multiple vantage points throughout the city offering beautiful window views and photogenic urban landscapes, as documented by photographers throughout the city.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Ostkreuz S-Bahn Station
off_the_beaten_path.description: An atmospheric local transit hub where you might encounter wildlife and experience authentic Berlin daily life away from tourist areas.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Landsberger Allee area
off_the_beaten_path.description: A local neighborhood gym area and surrounding district that represents everyday Berlin life in a non-touristy residential section.
